D Co. 2/8 CAV
Angry Skipper Archive
For Families Overview Roster Contribute
Contribute to
the Archive
If you served with D Co. 2/8 CAV, or have materials from a family member who did, we want to hear from you. All submissions are reviewed before being added.
Submit a Memory or Account

A story, anecdote, or firsthand account involving a soldier or event from D Co. 2/8 CAV.

Your email will not be published. Contact details for living veterans are held in restricted access only and never appear in any public view.
Submit a Photo or Document

Photographs, letters, military documents, field notes, or other materials related to D Co. 2/8 CAV.

Originals will never be requested without explicit consent. You retain ownership of all submitted materials.
D Co. 2/8 CAV · Angry Skipper
1st Cavalry Division (Airmobile) · Vietnam 1965–1972
Archive initiated April 2026 · Compiled by family
